notes: Norway carry a squad-wide sickness bug and fatigue from heavy travel, though key players including Haaland and Odegaard are confirmed fit; England are without Jordan Henderson (wrist surgery, tournament over) and Jarell Quansah (two-game suspension), with Marc Guehi (hamstring) and Declan Rice (illness) rated as serious doubts, and Reece James also a hamstring concern.
home_scorers: Erling Haaland (leading striker, 7 tournament goals, Golden Boot contender)
Martin Odegaard (playmaker/set-piece taker, creative hub of attack)
Antonio Nusa (left-wing starter, scored in four of five Norway matches)
away_scorers: Harry Kane (leading striker, 6 tournament goals, penalty taker)
Jude Bellingham (No.10, brace vs Mexico, elite tournament form)
Bukayo Saka (wide attacker/set-piece threat, top England creator)
